keyword.discard.name: Discard
keyword.discard.description: Return a card from the hand to the deck.
keyword.exhaust.name: Exhaust
keyword.exhaust.description: Remove a card from the hand for the rest of the battle.
keyword.item.name: Item
keyword.item.description: Card is removed from the deck when played.
keyword.instant.name: Instant
keyword.instant.description: Card is played immediately upon being assigned to a card slot.
keyword.shield.name: Shield
